data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for channel-aware conversation handling.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for channel-aware conversation handling across multiple platforms (web, SMS, voice, WhatsApp). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this capability. The linked use case mentions the need for channel-aware handling, but without specific evidence of how this is implemented or validated, the assessment remains inconclusive.
gaps: Lack of evidence showing channel-aware conversation handling across specified platforms.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify channel-aware conversation handling.
